character_portrait.description: 角色肖像图生成提示词模板
character_portrait.quality_suffix: high quality, detailed, professional portrait, 8k, sharp focus, studio lighting
character_portrait.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, distorted, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy, bad proportions

realistic.quality_suffix: photorealistic, hyperrealistic, 8k uhd, high resolution, professional photography
realistic.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, drawing, art, sketch

anime.quality_suffix: anime style, high quality anime art, detailed anime illustration, vibrant colors
anime.negative_prompt: realistic, photo, 3d render, low quality, blurry

cinematic.quality_suffix: cinematic lighting, movie still, dramatic lighting, professional cinematography, film grain
cinematic.negative_prompt: amateur, low budget, poor lighting, overexposed, underexposed
